## Asset

What are you adding or changing?

## Where It Lives

Poster, sticker, social, flyer, site, flag, QR, field card, other.

## Public Line

What does the artifact say?

## Scan Path

Where should it send people?

## Checks

- [ ] Reads at phone size.
- [ ] Reads from across the room.
- [ ] No text collisions.
- [ ] QR scans cleanly if included.
- [ ] Borrowed assets are credited or licensed.
- [ ] AI help is disclosed if needed.
